spec.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && alloc->n_chunks >= 0 && alloc->n_chunks <= 128 && (forall i in 0..alloc->n_chunks: valid(alloc->chunks[i]) || null(alloc->chunks[i])) && (forall i in 0..alloc->n_chunks, j in 0..alloc->n_chunks: i != j ==> alloc->chunks[i] != alloc->chunks[j] || null(alloc->chunks[i]))
spec.postcondition: ensures (forall i in 0..old(alloc->n_chunks): old(alloc->chunks[i]) is freed) && old(alloc) is freed && the memory/resources associated with alloc are released and alloc becomes invalid for future use
